benefit_description: Under the Plastic Mulching scheme, the Rajasthan government provided subsidies to farmers. In this, the soil surface of the field is covered with plastic film. Farmer can also use crop residues for laying mulch. [Tags: Farmer, Plastic Mulching, Farming, Agriculture]

name_en: Bhausaheb Fundkar Falbag Lagvad Scheme
name_hi: Bhausaheb Fundkar Falbag Lagvad Scheme
benefit_description: This scheme includes, Plantation of sixteen perennial horticulture crops. Farmer from Konkan division can avail benefit of 0.10 Hector  to 10.00 Hector  and rest Of Maharashtra 0.20 Hector  to 6.00 Hector [Tags: Direct Benefit Transfer, Farmer, General, Horticulture, Plantation]

name_en: Grishm Kaleen Dhan Ke Badle Dalhan, Tilhan, Makka Fasal ko Protsahan Yojana

benefit_description: The scheme was launched on April 30, 2014,  under the Agriculture Development and Farmer Welfare and Biotechnology Department, Chhattisgarh. The scheme aims to promote the cultivation of pulses, oilseeds, and maize as an alternative to summer rice, helping to conserve groundwater. [Tags: Agriculture, Oilseed, Farmer, Crop, Rural]

name_en: Atma Nirbhar Plantation Yojana

name_en: RKVY Soil Health and Fertility - Soil Health Card

[Tags: Soil Health, INM, Soil Testing, Farmer, RKVY]
office_info: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare — All Govt.

name_en: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Agricultural Fair/Exhibition/Farmer Camp Gujarat
name_hi: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Agricultural Fair/Exhibition/Farmer Camp Gujarat
benefit_description: The scheme aims to improve the agricultural productivity and the livelihood of Adivasi farmers. It provides hybrid seeds, fertilizers, equipment, and support for agricultural fairs. [Tags: Adivasi Farmers, Crop Production, Farmer Camp, Seeds, Fertilizer]

name_en: Kisan Samriddhi Yojana - Chhattisgarh

[Tags: Farmer, Agricultural, Mechanization, Subsidy, Custom Hiring Centre]

name_en: Soil Testing Laboratory

name_en: Mukhyamantri Dairy Plus Programme (Provision of 02 Murrah Buffaloes on Subsidy)

name_en: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization - Uttarakhand

[Tags: Farmer, Agricultural, Mechanization, Small Farmer, Marginal Farmer]

name_en: Financial Assistance for Setting up Crab Culture Unit

Only Fish Farmer/ Individual/ Registered Self Help Group/ Societies, interested in the setting up of the Crab Farming Unit. [Tags: Fishermen, Subsidy, Financial Assistance, Aquaculture]

name_en: Scheme for Assistance on Purchase of Smartphone by the Farmers

name_en: Udhyan Card

name_en: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana

name_en: Krishonnati Yojana - Sub Mission On Seed And Planting Material (SMSP)

This scheme is to help farmers improve their farming by using more water resources and encourage them to grow good crops. [Tags: Farming, Farmer, Development]

name_en: Green House
name_hi: Green House

name_en: Vermicompost Ikai

name_en: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Farmers for Purchasing Sanedo Agricultural Equipment

name_hi: Meghalaya Piggery Development Scheme
benefit_description: The Meghalaya Piggery Development Scheme is a component of the Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program launched by the Government of Meghalaya. It aims to employ, engage, and empower youth and rural communities by promoting piggery entrepreneurship through easy access to credit and subsidies. [Tags: Animal, Piggery, Farmer, Farming]

name_en: Seed Testing Laboratory Scheme
name_hi: Seed Testing Laboratory Scheme
benefit_description: The objective of the scheme is to assist seed testing services to farmers to ensure the viability and purity of seed to be sown. [Tags: Seed Testing, Laboratory, Farmer, Agriculture]

name_en: Maize Development through Cluster Approach Scheme
name_hi: Maize Development through Cluster Approach Scheme
benefit_description: The objectives of the scheme is to increase food grain production in order to attain self-sufficiency by growing high yielding varieties of maize and also by adopting the crop and location specific production technology. [Tags: Agriculture, Farmer, Maize, Quality Seeds]

name_en: Shednet House
name_hi: Shednet House
benefit_description: The Shednet House provided subsidies to farmers so they could earn more income by cultivating horticultural crops like vegetables, flowers, fruits, etc. by controlling the agro-climatic factors, temperature, humidity, and sunlight. [Tags: Farmer, Shednet House, Farming, Agriculture]

name_en: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Animal Husbandry
name_hi: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Animal Husbandry
benefit_description: The scheme provides loans to farmers for the purpose of animal husbandry, allowing them to improve their income through livestock. [Tags: Animal Husbandry Loan, Agriculture, Farmer]
office_info: Government of India — Tamil Nadu Govt.

name_en: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Purchase Solar Power Unit/Kit for Solar Fencing around the Farm
name_hi: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Purchase Solar Power Unit/Kit for Solar Fencing around the Farm
benefit_description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing solar power units/kits for solar fencing around their farms to protect crops from damage caused by wild and stray animals. [Tags: Agriculture, Farmer, Solar Power Unit]

name_en: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Exchange Programme
name_hi: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Exchange Programme
benefit_description: The scheme aims to increase agricultural productivity and production for SC/ST farmers who cannot afford improved seeds. It provides high-yielding improved seed varieties, up to one hectare, in exchange for existing crop or seed, backed by a 75% subsidy with a maximum limit of ₹1,500/-. [Tags: Agriculture, Seed, Farmer, Subsidy, Crop]
office_info: Government of India — Madhya Pradesh Govt.

name_en: Registration of Aromatic Plant Farmers - Centre for Aromatic Plants
name_hi: Registration of Aromatic Plant Farmers - Centre for Aromatic Plants
benefit_description: The registration ensures that farmers are eligible to access the benefits of all schemes offered by CAP, including state and central government subsidies, technical guidance, training programs, and product clearance support. [Tags: Aromatic, Farmer, Aromatic Plants, Registration]

name_en: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana - Uttarakhand
name_hi: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana - Uttarakhand
benefit_description: The scheme aims to promote & support organic farming among farmers in Uttarakhand. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹9,000/- per hectare to farmers for the purchase of organic inputs, including seeds, compost, green manure, biofertilizers, biopesticides, neem oil, etc. [Tags: Farmer, Traditional Agriculture, Organic Farming]

name_en: Fruit Area Expansion
name_hi: Fruit Area Expansion
benefit_description: The scheme aims to increase fruit production by encouraging farmers to establish new orchards, providing fruit plants at a 50% subsidy to support the expansion of fruit cultivation across Uttarakhand. [Tags: Horticulture, Fruit, Fruit Plants, Farmer]

name_en: Semi-Commercial Duck Farming
name_hi: Semi-Commercial Duck Farming
benefit_description: The scheme “Semi-Commercial Duck Farming” started under the State Sector Scheme "Encouragement of Commercial Poultry Entrepreneur and Promotion of Backyard Poultry Production" to support small entrepreneurs in setting up Duck farms with a capacity of 1000 ducks. [Tags: Duck, Farming, Entrepreneurs, Subsidy, Farmer]

name_en: Development and Maintenance of Orchard Cum Horti Nurseries
name_hi: Development and Maintenance of Orchard Cum Horti Nurseries
benefit_description: The scheme has been launched for the production and multiplication of good, high-yielding, diseased free planting materials in the Government farms for distribution to farmers through the District Horticulture Officer. [Tags: Orchard, Agriculture, Farmer, Horticulture, Training]

name_en: "Protected Cultivation" Component of "Establishment of New Gardens (Area Expansion)" Scheme
name_hi: "Protected Cultivation" Component of "Establishment of New Gardens (Area Expansion)" Scheme
benefit_description: Through this scheme, the farmers are provided Poly House, Shade Net House (Tubular Structure), Plastic Mulching at subsidised rates for practising Protected Cultivation. In Puducherry, this scheme is implemented by the Department of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, Union Territory of Puducherry. [Tags: Cultivation, Farmer, Subsidy, Garden, Horticulture]

name_en: Distribution of Vegetable Seeds Minikit & Fruits Minikit at Free of Cost
name_hi: Distribution of Vegetable Seeds Minikit & Fruits Minikit at Free of Cost
benefit_description: “Distribution of Vegetable Seeds Minikit & Fruits Minikit at Free of Cost" was launched by the Dept of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, UT of Puducherry. All the horticulture growers of rural & urban areas are provided with vegetable seeds minikit & fruits minikit worth ₹250/‐ free of cost. [Tags: Seed, Crop, Farmer, Fruit, Vegetable]

name_en: State Rice Mission Scheme
name_hi: State Rice Mission Scheme
benefit_description: The objective of the scheme is to increase productivity and production of rice through improved technologies and extension methods and, to supply the quality/certified seeds/organic fertilizers at 50% subsidy. [Tags: Rice, Farmer, Agriculture, Subsidy, Training]

name_en: Distribution of Soil Health Card
name_hi: Distribution of Soil Health Card
benefit_description: Under the “Distribution of Soil Health Card” scheme, Soil health cards will be distributed to all the farmers who have offered the soil sample for testing by paying a prescribed fee of ₹5/- each for Macro and Micronutrient testing. [Tags: Agriculture, Farmer, Soil Health Card]
office_info: Government of India — Tamil Nadu Govt.

name_en: Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties
name_hi: Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties
benefit_description: The "Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties"  introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, aims to promote the cultivation and production of local cotton seed varieties across Gujarat. [Tags: Agriculture, Cotton Seed, Subsidy, Farmer]

name_en: Trainning Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless farm labour at Centre of Excelence of Department
name_hi: Trainning Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless farm labour at Centre of Excelence of Department
benefit_description: The "Training Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless Farm Labour at Centre of Excellence of Department" aims to provide skill development training in horticulture to landless farm labourers through the Centres of Excellence. [Tags: Horticulture Training, Skill Development, Farmer]

name_en: Seed Grant
name_hi: Seed Grant
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide seeds to farmers at a concessional rate during Kisan Melas with a subsidy of up to 15%. [Tags: Agriculture, Subsidy, Farmer, Seed Distribution]

name_en: Employment Linked Skill Training Programme (ELSTP)
name_hi: Employment Linked Skill Training Programme (ELSTP)
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide free, self-employment-oriented training courses to unemployed/school dropouts/other disadvantaged youth of the state. It is a state-sponsored scheme that offers training in fields such as IT, healthcare, agriculture, beauty and wellness, electronics, and more. [Tags: Self-employment, Skill Training, Youth, ELSTP, Employment]

name_en: Strengthening Skills, Arts and Employment through ITIs
name_hi: Strengthening Skills, Arts and Employment through ITIs
benefit_description: The "Strengthening Skills, Arts, and Employment through ITIs" initiative by the Department of De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to connect these skills with modern technology, short-term, employment-oriented training has been provided through ITIs. [Tags: Student, Employment, Nomadic, Training, Skill]
office_info: Government of India — Madhya Pradesh Govt.

name_en: Sponsorship for Employment
name_hi: Sponsorship for Employment
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to ex-servicemen and their legal dependents by sponsoring them for contractual posts. Under this scheme, eligible candidates are sponsored for various departmental positions based on demand and their qualifications. [Tags: Employment, Contractual Employment, Ex-serviceman, UPNL]

name_en: Self Employment Scheme - Goa
name_hi: Self Employment Scheme - Goa
benefit_description: "Self Employment Scheme" provides financial support up to a maximum of ₹ 10,00,000 to any individual person belonging to Scheduled Tribes Community to undertake any self-employment activities. [Tags: Loan, Scheduled Tribe, Financial Assistance, Employment]

name_en: Self Employment Scheme Gujarat
name_hi: Self Employment Scheme Gujarat
benefit_description: The scheme provides unemployed tribal persons with affordable loans ranging from ₹50,000 to ₹5,00,000 at a 4% annual interest rate, aiming to help them establish self-employment opportunities. [Tags: Self Employment, Opportunity, Scheduled Tribe, Loan]

name_en: Training on Artificial Insemination for Self-Employment
name_hi: Training on Artificial Insemination for Self-Employment
benefit_description: The "Training on Artificial Insemination for Self-Employment" by the Animal Husbandry Department, Madhya Pradesh promotes milk production and employment. Trained Gausevaks get an honorarium of ₹4,000 and equipment worth ₹18,000. [Tags: Employment, Training, Animal Husbandry, Unemployed]
office_info: Government of India — Madhya Pradesh Govt.

name_en: Migrants Employment Generation Programme
name_hi: Migrants Employment Generation Programme
benefit_description: The Government of Tamil Nadu has launched the “Migrants Employment Generation Programme (MEGP)” for the Non-Resident Tamils, who returned back to Tamil Nadu due to Covid-19 Pandemic. [Tags: Covid-19, Migrant, Employment, Loan, Subsidy]
office_info: Government of India — Tamil Nadu Govt.

name_en: Employment Subsidy Scheme, 2017
name_hi: Employment Subsidy Scheme, 2017
benefit_description: The scheme aims to create an environment conducive for attracting investment in Goa, incentivise existing units, and boost local employment. It provides a subsidy based on the percentage of Goan employees hired, restricting reimbursement to ₹7,000/- per Goan employee per month. [Tags: Industry, Tourism, Enterprise, Employee, Subsidy]

name_en: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
name_hi: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
benefit_description: An employment scheme by the MoRD, providing provide at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled work. Any Indian citizen above the age of 18 years and residing in a rural area can apply to this scheme. [Tags: Employment, Labour, Unskilled, Panchayat, Job]
office_info: Ministry Of Rural Development — All Govt.

name_en: Goa Tribal's Employment Generation Programme Scheme
name_hi: Goa Tribal's Employment Generation Programme Scheme
benefit_description: "Goa Tribal’s Employment Generation Programme Scheme" provides a subsidy of 40% on the total loan amount i.e. 95% of the project cost. The scheme is for educated unemployed individuals in the 18 to 45 years age group who are members of the tribal communities of Goa. [Tags: Loan, Employment, Business, Entrepreneurship, Scheduled Tribe]

name_en: Self Employment Scheme
name_hi: Self Employment Scheme
benefit_description: Under this scheme, Subsidies will be provided to the religious minority communities with the help of Nationalized / Scheduled banks to start or improve a small-scale handicraft industry, service sector,  and agro-based activities. [Tags: Self Employment, Minorities, Empowerment]

name_en: Self-Employment Scheme: Vahan Loan Sahay Yojana
name_hi: Self-Employment Scheme: Vahan Loan Sahay Yojana
benefit_description: "Vahan Loan Sahay Yojana" is a component under the "Self-Employment Scheme" that provides on-road unit cost to self-employed individuals for purchasing vehicles such as rickshaws, loading rickshaws, Maruti cars, and jeep taxis. [Tags: Business, Self Employment, Vehicle Loan]

name_en: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Incentive for Self Employment
name_hi: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Incentive for Self Employment
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance not exceeding ₹50,000/- or the actual cost, whichever is less, to needy Goan artists or their families for setting up self-employment ventures, helping them establish sustainable income sources. The applications for this scheme are accepted Offline. [Tags: Artist, Employment, Entrepreneur, Livelihood, Income]

name_en: Msme Skill Training And Employment Scheme
name_hi: Msme Skill Training And Employment Scheme
benefit_description: The scheme “MSME Skill Training and Employment Scheme” was launched by the Department of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of Tamil Nadu during the years 2021-22. [Tags: MSME, Skill, Training, Employment, Stipend]
office_info: Government of India — Tamil Nadu Govt.

name_en: 6% Interest Subsidy on Loans taken through Banks up to a Limit of Rs.5 Lakh for Self-Employment
name_hi: 6% Interest Subsidy on Loans taken through Banks up to a Limit of Rs.5 Lakh for Self-Employment
benefit_description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among scheduled tribe (ST) individuals by making business loans affordable. Under this scheme, ST beneficiaries availing loans for self-employment are provided a interest subsidy to reduce financial burden and encourage entrepreneurship. [Tags: Loan, Subsidy, Employment, Scheduled Tribe, Tribal]

name_en: Self-Employment Scheme for Unemployed Minority Communities
name_hi: Self-Employment Scheme for Unemployed Minority Communities
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide a grant of 25% of the loan amount (for loans ranging from ₹1 lakh to ₹10 lakh) to individuals belonging to minority communities, who are permanent residents of Uttarakhand, for the purpose of self-employment. [Tags: Minority, Self Employment, Loan, Subsidy, Unemployed]

name_en: Afforestation Schemes Providing Incentives And Employment To Tribals In Forest
name_hi: Afforestation Schemes Providing Incentives And Employment To Tribals In Forest
benefit_description: This scheme offers grants to unemployed tribals for afforestation work, providing them with incentives and employment opportunities in forest operations. [Tags: Tribal Welfare, Afforestation, Incentives, Employment]
office_info: Government of India — Tamil Nadu Govt.

name_en: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Self Employment Programme for Transgender
name_hi: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Self Employment Programme for Transgender
benefit_description: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance to transgender individuals for self-employment/business establishment. Eligible beneficiaries can receive up to ₹50,000/- or 25% of the project cost. [Tags: Self-employment, Business, Transgender, Financial Assistance, Loan]

name_en: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Self-Employment/Business
name_hi: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Self-Employment/Business
benefit_description: Under this scheme, eligible boys and girls receive financial assistance in two installments - 60% initially and 40% later, to establish self-employment or business ventures. The support is specifically linked to the training course completed by the beneficiary. [Tags: Self-Employment, Business, Financial Assistance, Skill Development, Palanhar]

name_en: Jeevanam Self-Employment Scheme To Dependents Of Crime Victims
name_hi: Jeevanam Self-Employment Scheme To Dependents Of Crime Victims
benefit_description: The scheme “Jeevanam Self-Employment Scheme to Dependents of Crime Victims” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala. [Tags: Dependent, Victim, Self-Employment, Financial Assistance, Breadwinner]

name_en: Assistance Scheme For Reimbursement For Expenditure On Visa By Construction Workers For Employment Abroad
name_hi: Assistance Scheme For Reimbursement For Expenditure On Visa By Construction Workers For Employment Abroad
benefit_description: This scheme will be called "Reimbursement of expenditure incurred on visa for employment abroad to construction workers". The purpose of this scheme is to provide assistance to the registered beneficiaries employed in building and other construction works for better employment opportunities. [Tags: Construction Worker, Employment, VISA, Abroad, Assistance]

name_en: Self-Employment Scheme for Scheduled Castes and Tribes
name_hi: Self-Employment Scheme for Scheduled Castes and Tribes
benefit_description: The scheme aims to support scheduled castes and scheduled tribes families below the poverty line through concessional loans and subsidies for self-employment in various sectors. [Tags: Self-employment, Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, BPL, Loan]

name_en: Self-Employment Scheme: Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay
name_hi: Self-Employment Scheme: Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay
benefit_description: "Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay" is a component under the "Self-Employment Scheme" that provides 5% interest subsidy on a bank loan of ₹6,00,000/- for purchasing vehicles and setting up the required infrastructure. [Tags: Business, Entrepreneurship, Self Employment, Transport, Logistics]

name_en: Free Employment Oriented Training to Educated Unemployed Youth of Backward Class and Minority Class
name_hi: Free Employment Oriented Training to Educated Unemployed Youth of Backward Class and Minority Class
benefit_description: "Free Employment Oriented Training to Educated Unemployed Youth of Backward Class and Minority Class" aims to provide quality pre-examination training for various employment-oriented competitive examinations to talented but economically disadvantaged young men and women. [Tags: Employment, Educated, Backward Class, Minority, Training]
office_info: Government of India — Madhya Pradesh Govt.

name_en: Out of Turn Employment to Sportspersons in State Services
name_hi: Out of Turn Employment to Sportspersons in State Services
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide job opportunities to medal-winning sportspersons of Uttarakhand, who have represented the state in international and national games, by offering them out-of-turn employment in various state services. [Tags: Employment, Sports Quota Jobs, Athletes, Jobs, Sportspersons]

name_en: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units
name_hi: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units
benefit_description: This is a credit-linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities to Schedule castes, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Dairy units, Piggery units, and Sheep/Goat units. [Tags: Financial Assistance, Employment, Scheduled Caste, Livestock Unit, Subsidy]

name_en: Financial Assistance To Self-Employment For Trained Disabled Persons
name_hi: Financial Assistance To Self-Employment For Trained Disabled Persons
benefit_description: The "Financial Assistance to Self-Employment for Trained Disabled Persons" is a scheme by the Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to facilitate the purchase of equipment for those disabled persons who are completing their vocational training. [Tags: Persons With Disability, Social Welfare, Employment, Financial Assistance]

name_en: CHIEF MINISTER  EMPLOYMENT GENERATION  PROGRAMME (CMEGP)
name_hi: CHIEF MINISTER  EMPLOYMENT GENERATION  PROGRAMME (CMEGP)
benefit_description: Government of Maharashtra has approved the introduction of a new credit linked subsidy program called Chief Minister Employment Generation Program(CMEGP) for generation of employment opportunities through establishment of Micro & Small Enterprises in rural as well as urban areas in state. [Tags: Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, Female, Other Backward Class, Person With Disability]

name_en: Financial Assistance To Disabled For Self Employment
name_hi: Financial Assistance To Disabled For Self Employment
benefit_description: The objective of this scheme is to facilitate the self-employment of unemployed disabled persons. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to persons with disabilities for self-employment, small-scale business, and agro-based project. This scheme is 100% funded by Govt. of Maharashtra. [Tags: Persons With Disability, Social Welfare, Financial Assistance, Entrepreneurship, Business]

name_en: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities by Establishing Piggery, Sheep and Goat Units (General)
name_hi: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities by Establishing Piggery, Sheep and Goat Units (General)
benefit_description: This scheme is a credit linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Sheep or Goat Units (15 female+1 male) and Piggery Unit (10 female+1 male). [Tags: Self-employment, Piggery Unit, Sheep Unit, Goat Unit, Animal Husbandry]

name_en: Unemployed Youth Employment Generation Programme
name_hi: Unemployed Youth Employment Generation Programme
benefit_description: The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Department, Government of Tamil Nadu introduced the scheme "Unemployed Youth Employment Generation Programme (UYEGP)" which aims to mitigate the unemployment problems of socially and economically weaker sections of the society. [Tags: Unemployment, Youth, Loan, Business, Subsidy]
office_info: Government of India — Tamil Nadu Govt.

name_en: Chief Minister's Self Employment Scheme
name_hi: Chief Minister's Self Employment Scheme
benefit_description: The "Chief Minister's Self Employment Scheme" was launched by the Department of Personnel, and Reforms, Training, Public Grievances, Government of Sikkim. The scheme aims to provide loan to unemployed youth who belong below the poverty line. [Tags: Loan, Unemployed, BPL, Empowerment]

name_en: Internship Scheme Of The Ministry Of Labour & Employment
name_hi: Internship Scheme Of The Ministry Of Labour & Employment
benefit_description: Through the Internship Scheme, the Ministry of Labour & Employment engage eligible students as “Interns" to work for mutual benefit. The “Interns” shall have an opportunity to know about the Government functioning and Department Policy issues in the Government of India. [Tags: Student, Internship, Labour, Law, Research]
office_info: Ministry Of Labour and Employment — All Govt.

name_en: Financial Assistance to Youth Groups
name_hi: Financial Assistance to Youth Groups
benefit_description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment & entrepreneurship among rural youth by providing financial support. Financial assistance is provided to Mangal Dals affiliated with the department to help them start employment-oriented projects in 18 identified business sectors. [Tags: Employment, Self-employment, Entrepreneur, Mangal Dal, Youth]

name_en: One Family One Job Scheme
name_hi: One Family One Job Scheme
benefit_description: The scheme is implemented by the Directorate of Employment, Government of Haryana on 1st December, 1992 in Haryana State. Eligible applicants can register their names under this scheme, making them eligible for all benefits provided by the Employment Department. [Tags: Family, Job, Employment, Unemployed]

name_en: Mukhyamantri Shramshakti Yojana
name_hi: Mukhyamantri Shramshakti Yojana
benefit_description: This scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to men and women aged 18 to 45 from the minority community by offering vocational skill training in various fields or by providing loans through the Bihar State Minority Financial Corporation, Patna, for self-employment. [Tags: Minority, Training, Employment, Self-Employment, Vocational Courses]

name_en: Mukhyamantri Swarozgar Yojana - Uttarakhand
name_hi: Mukhyamantri Swarozgar Yojana - Uttarakhand
benefit_description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and entrepreneurship among the residents of Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance and subsidies for establishing new enterprises or upgrading existing small-scale units. [Tags: Entrepreneur, Manufacturing, Self-Employment, Employment, Enterprises]

name_en: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Chief Minister Self-Employment Scheme for Drivers/Conductors
name_hi: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Chief Minister Self-Employment Scheme for Drivers/Conductors
benefit_description: This scheme aims to support self-employment for registered drivers and conductors by providing financial assistance for the purchase of vehicles to eligible beneficiaries. [Tags: Financial Assistance, Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, Other Backward Class, Interest Subsidy]
office_info: Government of India — Madhya Pradesh Govt.

name_en: "Training in Silk" Component of the "Development of Silk" Scheme
name_hi: "Training in Silk" Component of the "Development of Silk" Scheme
benefit_description: The scheme aims to revamp the silk weaving industry and generate employment. It offers comprehensive one-year training to equip individuals with the necessary skills. The objective is to develop silk and silk-based industry, to train rural youth in silk weaving and to generate employment thereby. [Tags: Skill, Training, Silk, Industry, Employment]

name_en: National Pension Scheme For Traders And Self Employed Persons
name_hi: National Pension Scheme For Traders And Self Employed Persons
benefit_description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme by the Ministry of Labour and Employment. This scheme is meant for old age protection and social security of Small Scale Traders and Retailers. The beneficiary would receive a minimum assured pension of ₹ 3000/- per month after attaining the age of 60 yrs. [Tags: Pension, Employment, Self Employment, Traders]
office_info: Ministry Of Labour and Employment — All Govt.

name_en: Dastkar Prashikshan (I.T.I)
name_hi: Dastkar Prashikshan (I.T.I)
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide benefits to the youth of the state by connecting them with private-sector employment or self-employment opportunities through skills training offered at district ITIs. [Tags: Skill Development, Self-employment, ITI, Vocational Training, Youth]

name_en: Manav Garima Yojana
name_hi: Manav Garima Yojana
benefit_description: The scheme offers financial assistance to Scheduled Caste individuals who wish to establish cottage industries for self-employment without requiring bank loans. Employment/tool kits are provided to those who seek self-employment opportunities. [Tags: Tool Kits, SC, Trade, Self-employment]

name_en: Manav Kalyan Yojana
name_hi: Manav Kalyan Yojana
benefit_description: The scheme provides toolkit assistance (e-vouchers) to economically weak individuals (annual income ≤ ₹6,00,000/-) for self-employment in 10 trades like dairy, plumbing, and beauty parlors. Beneficiaries include SC/ST, nomadic tribes, and BPL families. [Tags: Toolkit, Employment, Trade, Artisan, Voucher]

name_en: Community Based Training Scheme
name_hi: Community Based Training Scheme
benefit_description: The "Community Based Training Scheme" aims to provide training in heavy vehicle driving, shorthand, security services, office soft skills, retail sales, and beauty parlor courses (male & female) to unemployed young men and women belonging to minority communities for self-employment or employment. [Tags: Skill Development, Employment, Unemployed, Minority Community]

name_en: Vrutti Protsaha Loan Scheme
name_hi: Vrutti Protsaha Loan Scheme
benefit_description: The "Vrutti Protsaha Loan Scheme" is an initiative by the Karnataka Minority Development Corporation (KMDC) to promote self-employment and economic activities among minority communities. The scheme provides financial assistance to eligible individuals from minority communities. [Tags: Loan, Self-employment, Subsidy, Minority]

name_en: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Scheduled Caste)
name_hi: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Scheduled Caste)
benefit_description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among Scheduled Castes. It provides financial aid, including loans, margin money, and grants, for livelihood projects. [Tags: Financial Assistance, Loan, Scheduled Caste, Self-Employment]

name_en: Mukhya mantri Swarojgar Yojana
name_hi: Mukhya mantri Swarojgar Yojana
benefit_description: The scheme aims to provide benefits financial assistance, interest subsidies, and a guarantee. the government of Madhya Pradesh gives loans to the state's citizens to establish employment so that all citizens can start employment. [Tags: Self Employment, Business, Financial Assistance, Loan, Bank]
office_info: Government of India — Madhya Pradesh Govt.

name_en: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
name_hi: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
benefit_description: Under the scheme, an unemployed resident of Haryana belonging to the Scheduled Caste category can avail a subsidy for purchasing livestock. This subsidy will be provided after the establishment of the livestock units and can be availed as a loan by the beneficiary. [Tags: Financial Assistance, Animal Husbandry, Dairying, Employment, Scheduled Caste]

name_en: Chief Minister's Jeevan Jyoti Swaniyojan Yojana
name_hi: Chief Minister's Jeevan Jyoti Swaniyojan Yojana
benefit_description: The Chief Minister's Jeevan Jyoti Swaniyojan Yojana is a self-employment scheme initiated by the Government of Assam. The primary objective of the scheme is to provide avenues of self-employment to educated unemployed youth in Assam. [Tags: Jeevan Jyoti, Employment, Youth Empowerment, Unemployed, Selfemployed]

name_en: Mukhyamantri Mahila Udyami Yojana
name_hi: Mukhyamantri Mahila Udyami Yojana
benefit_description: This is a flagship scheme of the Bihar government aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among the youth by providing financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up businesses. [Tags: Women Entrepreneurship, Youth, Business, Self Employment]

name_en: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Help Group - Uttarakhand
name_hi: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Help Group - Uttarakhand
benefit_description: The scheme aims to empower urban poor women in Uttarakhand by promoting the formation of self-help groups, improving their livelihoods, and supporting them in income-generating and self-employment activities through financial incentives, bank loans, and government subsidies. [Tags: Self-Employment, Loan, Urban Area, Employment, Self-Help Group]

name_en: Mukhyamantri Swarozgar Yojana Ati Sukshm (Nano) Udhyam
name_hi: Mukhyamantri Swarozgar Yojana Ati Sukshm (Nano) Udhyam
benefit_description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and entrepreneurship among the residents of Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance through banks to facilitate the establishment of new micro (nano) enterprises as well as the expansion of existing businesses. name_en: Goa State 25% Subsidy for Self Employed Scheme

name_en: Mukhyamantri Swasthya Sahayata Yojana Jharkhand

name_en: Mukhyamantri Bal Poshan Yojana

name_en: Mukhyamantri Awas Yojna (HPBOCWWB)

The beneficiaries include Economically Weaker Section (EWS) / Low Income Group (LIG) and Middle Income Group (MIG) categories, including slum dwellers, by ensuring a pucca house to all eligible urban households by 2022. name_en: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (NT-DNT)

name_en: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban: Individual House Construction Component - Beneficiary Led Construction (BLC) Uttarakhand

benefit_description: "Outstanding SC/ST Entrepreneur" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises” is a scheme by the Industries and Commerce Dept, UT of Puducherry, formulated to award the best SC/ST entrepreneurs. [Tags: Business, Entrepreneur, Grant, Startup]

name_en: "Assistance for Technology Acquisition" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Capital Intensive Industries"

name_en: "Capital Investment Subsidy (for New and Existing Industries)" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Capital Intensive Industries"

The applications are accepted offline in the prescribed form available on the Official website. [Tags: Building, Machinery, Subsidy, Investment, MSME]

name_en: Credit Enhancement Guarantee Scheme For The Scheduled Castes

office_info: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment — All Govt.

name_en: "Capital Investment Subsidy: Physically Handicapped Persons/ Ex-Servicemen" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"

name_en: "Rent Subsidy" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"

office_info: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare

name_en: National Food Security Mission
name_hi: राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा मिशन
benefit_description: Scheme to increase production and productivity of wheat, rice, pulses, coarse cereals, and commercial crops through area expansion and productivity enhancement in a sustainable manner.
how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices
office_info: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare

name_en: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
name_hi: राष्ट्रीय कृषि विकास योजना
benefit_description: Scheme to achieve 4% annual growth in the agriculture sector by ensuring a holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors.
how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices
office_info: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare

name_hi: कृषि यांत्रिकीकरण पर उप-मिशन
benefit_description: Scheme to promote the usage of modern and efficient farm equipment and machinery to enhance farm productivity and income of farmers.
how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices
office_info: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare

how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices
office_info: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare

name_hi: प्रधान मंत्री किसान सम्मान निधि

office_info: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare

name_hi: कर्नाटक बीज पूंजी कार्यक्रम

how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices in Karnataka
office_info: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka

name_en: Karnataka Solar Pump Scheme
name_hi: कर्नाटक सौर पंप योजना
benefit_description: Scheme to provide financial assistance of up to Rs. 1 lakh for the installation of solar-powered irrigation pumps to farmers in Karnataka.
how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices in Karnataka
office_info: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka

name_hi: कर्नाटक बीज और उर्वरक सब्सिडी
benefit_description: Scheme to provide subsidies on the purchase of certified seeds and fertilizers to farmers in Karnataka.
how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices in Karnataka
office_info: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka

how_to_apply: Apply through local agriculture department offices in Karnataka
office_info: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka
